name: studiomcphub
title: StudioMCPHub
description: Creative AI tools and museum art datasets for autonomous agents. 32 MCP tools (18 free): image generation (SD 3.5 + Imagen 3), 5-model ESRGAN upscaling, tiered metadata enrichment, background removal, product mockups (6 products), CMYK color conversion, print-ready PDF/TIFF with bleed and crop marks, SVG vectorization, invisible DCT watermarking, palette extraction, resize/convert, provenance registration, Arweave permanent storage, NFT minting, wallet storage, and 53K+ museum artworks from Alexandria Aeternum. Three payment rails: x402 USDC micropayments, Stripe per-call, and GCX credits with volume discounts. Rate limited: 10/hr anonymous, 60/hr registered.
